I’m exhausted mentally and physically but tonight I found out we urgently need thermal drones.

Without them, we are almost paralyzed at night.

I have a chance to get at least one on Monday. 

Maybe two, if I can somehow make it happen. 

But I can’t do it alone.

This is me asking directly, desperately, and honestly: please help.

Every donation, every share, every message to someone who might be able to help matters right now. 

We are infantry, our safety depends on it. 

Our ability to move, see, and survive depends on it.

Please help us get a drone before Monday.

quoted_tweet.text:
خلال سنواتٍ مضت وحتى اليوم، شاهدتُ وقرأتُ لكثيرٍ من سير رجال الأعمال، عددًا لم أُحصِهِ ..

ولكن! لم أجد (قصة نجاح مؤثرة وبعمق) كما وجدتها في قصة أخي/ د. حمد الهاجري @halhjri14

عن ماذا أتحدث لكم عن أخي/ بو هادي؟!

هل أتحدث لكم عن القائد الفذ؟ أم عن الطموح الشامخ؟ أم عن المبادر الفعّال؟ أم عن المبدع المبتكر؟ أم عن صانع التاريخ والمجد؟

قصتك يا بو هادي هي أكثر قصةٍ لرجل أعمال قد أثّرت في نفسي على الإطلاق، وفي نهاية اللقاء صفّقتُ لك بلا شعور ..

قصةٌ كلّها تحدٍّ وإلهام، صلابةٌ وثبات، عزيمةٌ وإرادةٌ وقوة، وقبل ذلك كله، تجلّت (القيادة) في سيرتك العطرة ..

إني أدعو الجميع لمشاهدتها، وأدعو كل الصناديق السيادية الاستثمارية الحكومية لدعمك وبقوة، لتحقيق حلمك، وهو حلم كل خليجي عربي، بأن تكون لدينا شركات عملاقة خليجية عربية تسود العالَم في نشاطها ..

ختامًا: أدعوك يا بو هادي أن تؤلف كتابًا لقصتك هذه ولا تتأخر في إصداره، لتكون مصدر إلهامٍ للشباب الخليجي والعربي.

kept.text:
7 years ago, I saw Elon Musk at an event.

I didn't speak to him. I didn't shake his hand. I just watched him cross the floor.

The aura was different.

I couldn't explain it then. I can now.

When I was a kid, I used to watch ants build colonies. I'd sit there for hours. One ant would walk a path. Then another would walk the same path. Then another. By sunset, the whole colony moved along that single line.

None of them questioned why.

The first ant chose by accident. Every ant after followed the accident as if it was law. The path became sacred. The path was just one ant's random decision crystallized into tradition.

That's most people.

Every other person in that room was an ant on the path. Brilliant ants. Wealthy ants. Successful ants. But ants. Each of them carrying invisible inheritance: assumptions made by other people in other times for reasons nobody alive remembers.

He wasn't.

Aerospace told him rockets cost 65 million dollars. He asked what they were made of. Aluminum, titanium, copper, carbon fiber. Material cost: 2 percent of the price. The other 98 percent was tradition pretending to be physics. He built rockets from raw materials and cut costs by 10x.

Auto industry told him electric cars couldn't compete. He asked why. Batteries were expensive because the industry bought assembled batteries at markup. Materials cost less. He made his own batteries. Tesla became worth more than every legacy automaker combined.

Banking told him payments were a solved problem. He asked who solved it. Banks did, in 1950, for a different world. He built PayPal. Sold it for 180 million dollars at 28 years old.

This is the pattern.

While everyone else inherits the path from accidental ants, he asks why the path exists. While everyone else optimizes within the assumption, he questions the assumption. While everyone else competes on execution, he competes on perception of reality.

The aura wasn't charisma. It wasn't height or voice or eye contact.

It was the absence of inherited weight.

Most people you meet are carrying centuries of unexamined assumptions. They believe what their teachers believed who believed what their teachers believed who believed what some ant decided by accident in 1923. The weight is invisible but it's real. You feel it when you stand near them.

He wasn't carrying any of it.

That's what genius is. Not higher IQ. Not more information. Not better memory. Just the willingness to question every assumption others accept and the discipline to rebuild reality from atoms instead of inheriting it from convention.

7 years later, I run my entire life this way.

Every decision: what is this actually made of? What am I assuming? What would this look like if I designed it from atoms instead of borrowing it from people who designed it for situations that no longer exist?

The willingness to do this work separates the ants from the architects.

Most people will never do it. It's slower upfront. It's lonelier. It requires tolerating the discomfort of disagreeing with consensus when consensus feels safe.

But compound interest on first principles thinking over decades is what built SpaceX. It's what built Tesla. It's what built every empire worth studying.

The man crossing that floor wasn't magic.

He was just one of the few humans alive actually thinking for himself while the rest of the world rented their conclusions from accidental ants.

That's the aura.

That's what it feels like.

That's what it costs.

kept.text:
【クラファンの件について】
以下英文＋追記分を記載させて頂きます。
画像も英文をご用意致しましたので海外勢の方はご確認いただけますと助かります！よろしくお願いします。

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝
To those who supported our crowdfunding campaign via PayPal: It appears that you may be eligible for a refund if you submit a refund request through PayPal. I have provided step-by-step instructions with images below, so please submit a refund request. Please note that PayPal’s refund window is 180 days, so we would appreciate it if you could act promptly.

① Go to your transaction history on the PayPal app home screen. 
② Find the transaction with Ubugoe. 
③ Scroll to the very bottom of the Ubugoe transaction screen, where you’ll see “Report a problem”; tap it. 
④ Fill out the form exactly as explained in the livestream (refer to the image for guidance) and submit the report. (Note: The button may have changed.)

Please use the third image attached to this post as your reference. (Notice regarding the Ura Meshi Kanta Mini-Album & Music Video Production Project) We have revised part of the document because it was unclear from previous versions who should be responsible for the refund.

Note: This text was translated using a translation tool, so the translation may differ from the original intended meaning. If you have any questions, please reply to this post.

*Update: May 3
After completing steps 1 through 9, PayPal may arrange a discussion with Ubugoe.
(PayPal will provide instructions on how to contact Ubugoe.)
In that case, please submit several refund requests to Ubugoe through PayPal.
If you do not receive a response from Ubugoe within a few days, please contact PayPal again to request resolution of the issue.

quoted_tweet.text:
クラウドファンディングをPayPalでご支援くださった方へ。 PayPalへの返金リクエストを行うと返金される可能性がある様です。手順を画像付きで書いていますので返金リクエストを送って頂きたいです。 またPayPalの返金対応期間が180日となっておりますので早急にご対応頂けますと幸いです。

①PayPalのアプリホーム画面で取引のログを辿る。
②うぶごえとの取引を探す。
③うぶごえとの取引で画面の一番下まで行くと問題を報告との表示が出るので押す。
④配信でお話(画像を参考に入力していく)した通りに記入し報告する。(※ボタンが変わっている可能性があります)

添付する画像はこのポストに載せた3枚目の画像を使用して下さい。（うら飯紺汰ミニアルバム&MV制作プロジェクトについてのお知らせ） 過去の文書では誰が返金するべき方なのかわかりづらかった為、一部文書を修正したものになります。

kept.text:
⚡️ GEAR & EQUIPMENT COLLECTION FOR WAVE RAID 🌊

We need to equip new guys and keep drone work running.
Nothing extra here. Just what is actually needed to do the job.

🎯 Goal: €15,000
💰 DAY 1 — Collected: €
📊 Left: €15,000

📩 Donate:
https://t.co/2FThpdqe2k
https://t.co/hO5IUHw3sA
https://t.co/wDvlYc2YKA

Bank transfer:
Triinu Perve
IBAN: LT88 3250 0238 5165 2659
SWIFT/BIC: REVOLT21

⸻

This is my people.

Black Sea direction.
Where mistakes are not forgiven and there is no second try if something is missing.

This is not about comfort.
This is about being able to work, move, react and come back alive.

⸻

🧩 WHAT IS NEEDED

• Infrared helmet lights
• Push to talk systems (PTT)
• Combat shirts (different sizes)
• Combat pants (different sizes)

• Tourniquet (TQ) pouches
• Magazine pouches
• General purpose pouches (medical / utility)
• Dump pouches

• Front panels with zipper
• Radio pouches
• Shoulder pad covers for plate carriers

• Mounting clips for PTT systems
• NVG mounts

• Drone equipment / FPV components

⸻

Everything here is used daily.
Everything here solves a real problem.

No gear = slower work
Slower work = higher risk
Higher risk = people don’t come back

⸻

If you’ve been thinking about helping — now is the moment.
If you’ve helped before — you already know how much this matters.

Even small donations move this forward.

🤝
